pi_items.verified_value: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com (as configured in this deployment, but differs from official ArkCase defaults)
pi_items.source: Confirmed in task_utils.sh line 10 and setup_arkcase.sh line 254. However, official ArkCase documentation (https://www.arkcase.com/product/arkcase-open-source-case-management-platform/) references default user as 'arkcase-admin@arkcase.org'. The domain 'dev.arkcase.com' does not appear in official ArkCase Helm charts documentation (https://github.com/ArkCase/ark_helm_charts). Samba default domain is CORP.EXAMPLE.COM per ark_samba README (https://github.com/ArkCase/ark_samba).

pi_items.verified_value: ArkCase1234! (as configured in this deployment, but differs from official default)
pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_arkcase.sh line 250 where password is set via 'samba-tool user setpassword'. However, official ArkCase Community Edition documentation indicates default password is '@rKc@3e'. This deployment explicitly overrides the default.

privileged_info_summary: ArkCase is an open-source case management platform deployed via Kubernetes Helm. The task creates a synthetic organizational group named 'FOIA_Senior_Analysts' with description 'Senior FOIA analysts with elevated review permissions'. The deployment uses custom LDAP credentials (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!) that differ from the official documented defaults (arkcase-admin@arkcase.org / @rKc@3e). The LDAP domain 'dev.arkcase.com' is not documented in official ArkCase Helm chart documentation; the Samba default domain is CORP.EXAMPLE.COM. All task data is synthetic (created for testing), not from real external sources.
